nasb.text: And he said, “The one who showed mercy toward him.” Then Jesus said to him, “Go and do the same.”

esv.text: He said, “The one who showed him mercy.” And Jesus said to him, “You go, and do likewise.”

cnv.text: 他說：“是那憐憫他的。”耶穌說：“你去，照樣作吧。”

ccb.text: 律法教师说：“是那个同情他的人。” 耶稣说：“你去照样做吧。”

csbs.text: 律法师说：“是那个怜悯他的人。” 耶稣对他说：“你去如此做吧。”
